Title: Provides enhanced building aid for school construction projects in municipalities that meet transit-oriented development or housing growth benchmarks
Summary: Provides that for any school district located wholly or partially within a municipality that meets transit-oriented development or housing growth benchmarks, the approved building aid ratio for any eligible capital construction project shall be increased by five percentage points.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the education law, in relation to providing enhanced building aid for school construction projects in municipalities that meet transit-oriented development or housing growth benchmarks
